title: www.drybulkETF.com - March 2, 2021
summary: Following the recent frenzy in dry bulk rates, attention turns to Capesize seasonal upturn - With the sub-cape dry Global economy recovers, positively impacting dry bulk shipping - With widespread vaccinations taking place Volatility in freight should increase - In 2021, we expect demand growth for dry bulk shipping to total almost 3x
